title: Onboard Research — Project Config
description: Optional target-repo config at .claude/onboard-research.config.json that tunes the research roster: disable built-in dimensions and/or add custom specialists. Each custom specialist supplies a prompt or an agent reference and emits research-findings.json-shaped output so it flows through the same verifier and synthesizer.

disabledBuiltins.description: Built-in dimensions to turn off for this project.

prompt.description: Inline specialist prompt. Provide this OR `agent`.

agent.description: Path to a user agent file, e.g. .claude/agents/research-a11y.md. Provide this OR `prompt`.
